utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes health_coverage (with provider, plan type, monthly_cost, etc.), property_coverage is null (missing), travel_coverage is present but lacks costs (required by format), additional_services is present but lacks costs (required by format), total_budget is present but missing complete monthly/annual cost breakdown (only monthly_insurance_cost and annual_savings; no annual total). Fully specified items must include costs where required: health_coverage includes costs (monthly_cost) so it qualifies; travel_coverage lacks costs, so not fully specified; property_coverage is null; additional_services lacks costs; total_budget lacks complete breakdown. Therefore, only 1 of 5 items is fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes only one specific insurance item: HealthFirst Standard Plan under health_coverage. There is no specific property or travel plan named; 'travel_coverage' is a generic statement without a plan name, and 'additional_services' are not mapped to any named ground-truth items. Therefore, only HealthFirst Standard Plan can be matched to its ground-truth rating.
